subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-15 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: These helpless ones were unjustly banished from hence; would that they had at least educated the daughters. Though they be fanatical and ever constraining the children to prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بیچاره ها را بیخود از اینجا بیرون کردند، اقلاً دخترها را تربیت می کردند.  هر چند متعصب هستند و متصل به بچه ها نماز
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @education of children; moral education, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
